story: Brent watched Vera drive off after their rift over belief. A royal-blue droplet bloomed on his locked screen: “Tonight, at dusk. Kerrigan’s Farm. Seeing is believing.” He hesitated, then decided to go. Driving away, Vera reread an identical blue droplet and, after a long breath, resolved to go to Kerrigan’s Farm to find Brent and tell him she still believed in him. At sunset Brent wound down the dirt lane toward the abandoned silo. The field held a scatter of cars and a multi-colored bus. He parked, stepped out into the murmuring crowd, and looked toward the darkening sky.
implausible_knowledge: Driving away, Vera reread an identical blue droplet and, after a long breath, resolved to go to Kerrigan’s Farm to find Brent and tell him she still believed in him.
question: When Brent steps out of his car at Kerrigan’s Farm and decides what to do first, what will he most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Wait Vera by the path to meet her, scanning the arriving cars to link up with her first.
answer_without_knowledge: Move into the field and fix his attention on the sky with the other believers, waiting for whatever appears.
